channel.title: personal on Oklomsy.com
channel.description: Recent content in personal on Oklomsy.com

item.title: What does "Technologically accessible" mean?
item.description: You may have read my blog post about why the Internet sucks, there are so many reasons and I will explain every single one here and also what it means to be technologically accessible. Present Right now, most websites contain code or assets from other websites, websites might import fonts from Google Fonts or they might use Google Analytics to collect user metrics. The problem is that these tools slow the web, harm privacy and makes big tech bigger.

item.title: The Vollsmose Construction Experience
item.description: Context Vollsmose is a small suburb in the City of Odense in Denmark, it is infamous for it’s high crime, high unemployment and many non-ethnic danes living in there. Because of that, it’s a hot topic every single election. But in the future, the violence, the unemployment and Vollsmose’s infamous reputation might end. 2015 and Immigration In 2015, the Immigration crisis brought many non-ethnic danes to Vollsmose, Vollsmose was filled with affordable private apartment blocks so the immigrants who arrived in Denmark naturally tried to find a place in Vollsmose where they could live.

item.title: The Vollsmose Construction Experience
item.description: Context Vollsmose is a small suburb in the City of Odense in Denmark, it is infamous for it’s high crime, high unemployment and many non-ethnic danes living in there. Because of that, it’s a hot topic every single election. But in the future, the violence, the unemployment and Vollsmose’s infamous reputation might end. 2015 and Immigration In 2015, the Immigration crisis brought many non-ethnic danes to Vollsmose, Vollsmose was filled with affordable private apartment blocks so the immigrants who arrived in Denmark naturally tried to find a place in Vollsmose where they could live.
